objective: Fix recent wrong-answer ordering and timestamp visibility in parent report flows.
summary_of_changes: Unified attempt timestamp parsing, added a shared correctness helper, preserved ts and answeredAt in normalized report payloads, changed wrong-event selection to sort all incorrect attempts descending before truncating, added defensive UI sorting, surfaced answer time in the recent-wrong cards, and made weak-area explanations more parent-readable.
residual_risk: Week-over-week metrics may still rely on inconsistent identity mapping between display name and local telemetry user id.
next_step: Audit week-over-week identity and data-window semantics separately from recent-wrong ordering.

objective: Add root-level iteration memory scaffold for long-run agent work.
summary_of_changes: Created repository-wide rules for mandatory pre-read, done definition, validation expectations, anti-patterns, and required writeback. Seeded root change history and lessons learned with concrete entries from the recent parent-report fix.
tests_run: manual review of file structure and field consistency
residual_risk: The scaffold only compounds value if future iterations consistently read and update it.
next_step: Use these files as the mandatory pre-flight context for the next parent-report, stats, and hint-quality iteration.

objective: Make exam-sprint wrong-answer retry flow reliably re-check corrected answers while preserving simplest-fraction enforcement.
summary_of_changes: Kept the existing fraction simplest-form validation, added a retry-focus helper that returns focus to the answer field after a wrong attempt, and changed Enter-key handling so pressing Enter on the submit button re-runs answer checking instead of incorrectly acknowledging and advancing past the question.
residual_risk: Advancing to a new question is still intentionally gated behind acknowledge/skip after a wrong attempt; if product wants fully ungated next-question navigation, that should be a separate UX decision.
next_step: If retry UX complaints continue, audit all non-answer Enter paths and mouse-focus transitions in exam-sprint to ensure they always prefer re-check over accidental advance.

objective: Extract parent-report domain logic into 5 shared engines, connect page to engines, add regression tests, improve UX (weakness cards, copy export, weekly focus, AI actions).
summary_of_changes: Created 5 shared report engines (weakness, recommendation, report_data_builder, practice_from_wrong, parent_copy). Refactored parent-report/index.html to delegate all domain logic (explainWrongDetail, buildPracticeFromWrong, renderWeeklyFocus, renderAiActions, copy text) to shared engines. Replaced table-based weakness display with card-style rendering including ranking, reason, and next-action from weakness engine. Added enrichReportData call to both showDashboard and refreshReport flows. Created 10 regression tests (6 spec + 4 integration) all passing. Added agent preflight/postflight scripts and acceptance spec.
residual_risk: renderDashboard still has significant inline code for h24, KPI grid, daily chart, WoW comparison, radar, and progress trend. These could be further extracted in future iterations.
next_step: Push, run cross_validate_remote, then consider extracting remaining renderDashboard subsections into shared modules.
